name: Tagliarini with Marinated Dried Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Oil-pk sun-dried tomatoes, cut into 1/8 inch strips, reserve the oil
recipeInstructions:
1. In a serving bowl, whisk together the eggs, tomato strips, reserved oil, Parmesan cheese, parsley, garlic, and lemon juice.
2. Add the drained tagliarini to the egg mixture. Gently lift with two forks to combine.
3. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
